English | Azərbaycanca

Lesson 6 - Everyday Objects & Articles

Use a/an and basic nouns

Goal

Use a/an and basic nouns.

Content

1) Everyday Objects

pen, phone, bag, key, book

2) Articles

a / an

3) This Is a...

This is a pen. This is an apple.

Practice

Identify 5 Objects Around You

Say each object with a/an, for example: a pen, a bag, a key.

Open Articles Exercises

Drag and Drop: a / an

Sort the words into "a" or "an"

Drag each word to the correct article box. On touch devices, tap a word then tap a box.

a

an

Lesson Complete

Keep practicing with objects you can see every day.

Back to Lesson 5 Next: Lesson 7 Back to A0 Course View All Courses
